Topics in the **Arts & Culture** category of *the year 2012*.

| [Adele's Album "21" — 2012 Dominance](adeles-21-album.md) | Adele swept all six of her categories at the 54th Grammy Awards on February 12, and *21* became the best-selling US album for a second consecutive year — an unmatched feat of the SoundScan era. |
| [The Hobbit: An Unexpected Journey](the-hobbit-unexpected-journey.md) | Peter Jackson's first Middle-earth prequel, released December 14; grossed $1.017 billion worldwide and brought a controversial 48-frames-per-second high frame rate to mainstream cinema. |
| [Pro Evolution Soccer 2013](pro-evolution-soccer-2013.md) | Konami's football simulation, released in September; added all 20 Brazilian Série A clubs for the first time and earned an 82/100 Metacritic score in a critical comeback — the final PES title for Nintendo's home consoles. |
